name: Interest rate statistics
description_short: Statistics on interest rates applied by monetary financial institutions on loans and deposits to households and non-financial corporations, providing a comprehensive view of lending and deposit rates across the euro area.
use_cases: What is the average interest rate on new mortgages in Germany?
How do consumer credit rates compare across euro area countries?
What is the average rate on new business loans in Spain?
How have deposit rates evolved since the ECB started raising rates?
